title: Fiscal Management & Ethics
description: This policy covers how the school district manages its finances and upholds ethical standards in financial decision-making. It applies to district administrators and school board members who are responsible for handling public funds. Parents and community members should be aware of this policy because it helps ensure that taxpayer money is spent responsibly and that financial decisions are made with integrity and transparency.

timeline.summary: This is a cover/agenda slide for a Second Reading of nine Local board policies for Conroe ISD. The policies span topics including board governance, fiscal management, revenues, cybersecurity, employee conduct, curriculum, gifted & talented programs, and campus conduct/advertising. No redline text or specific language changes are visible on this page.
changes_added: As an applicant, recipient, or subrecipient of a Federal award' and 'conflict of interest' and 'violation of the civil False Claims Act. This applies to potentially affecting a federal grant award (including any activities or subwards thereunder).
timeline.discussion: policy and a superintendent Facebook post
timeline.notes: This is a table of contents / agenda slide (page 128) listing policies under 'Second Reading.' It does not contain redline text or specific policy language. Detailed changes would appear in subsequent pages of the packet for each individual policy.

timeline.summary: The Administration is recommending consideration, discussion, and adoption of revisions to Local Board Policy CAA (Local) — Fiscal Management Goals and Objectives: Financial Ethics. The specific content of the revisions is not visible on this cover/proposal page.
timeline.discussion:
elegation of authority to the board president (e.g., setting the agenda, speaking to media).
- Trustee Dawson requested clarity on where existing delegation policies reside — staff to follow up.

### CAA Local — Fiscal Management Goals/Financial Ethics
- Requires disclosure of certain federal criminal law violations in connection with federal awards.
- Trustee noted the legal reference tab on the website appears empty for this policy — staff to investigate.

### CDA Local — Other Revenues and Investments
- Ensures district funds are invested in accordance with the Public Funds Investment Act.
